name: aquaman
description: 🔱 API key protection for AI agents. Bring your own vault. Credentials stay where you already keep them, never in the agent's memory.

scripts.build: npm run build -w aquaman-proxy -w aquaman-plugin -w aquaman-coder
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspaces && rm -rf dist packages/*/tsconfig.tsbuildinfo
scripts.lint: oxlint src test packages --ignore-pattern node_modules --ignore-pattern dist --ignore-pattern coverage
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint src test packages --ignore-pattern node_modules --ignore-pattern dist --ignore-pattern coverage --fix

author: tech4242
